title: Traffic Delays on US 74 Due to Rollover Crash

title: Charlotte Weather Forecast: Cooler Mid-Week, Warmer Weekend
summary: Charlotte is expecting dry weather for the next week with a warming trend into the weekend.

title: Gaston County Farmers Markets to Accept SNAP Benefits

title: Why Charlotte Didn't See Snow Despite Forecasts
summary: Frigid temperatures created snow, but atmospheric conditions prevented it from reaching the ground in Charlotte.
